tools.name: search_listings
tools.description: Search live GSA federal-surplus auction listings (facts only — no images). Filter by state, category, keyword, and price. Raw listings cover sanctioned federal sources; sold-price comps span the full market.

tools.name: get_listing
tools.description: Get one live GSA listing by its id (facts only).

tools.name: get_sold_comps
tools.description: Sold-price range (25th/median/75th percentile of final prices) for a described item, computed across the full US government-surplus market. Free — no API key required (rate-limited).

tools.name: get_flip_score
tools.description: GovAuctions Flip Score resale signal for a live GSA listing (valued against the full-market comp archive): estimated value, effective bid, and discount.
